ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country (e.g., AUT for Austria) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region to which the country belongs (e.g., EUR for Europe) */,
  "subregion_code" TEXT /* Code for the subregion to which the country belongs (e.g., WES for Western Europe) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each variable (e.g., MOR_V for Mortality rate) */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Full name of the variable */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the unit of measurement (e.g., NBR for Number) */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Full name of the unit of measurement */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category of the variable (e.g., DEMO for Demographics, ENV for Environment) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Full name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variable */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum possible value for the variable */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum possible value for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "risks" (
  "risk_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each risk (e.g., AIRPOL_IN for Air pollution from solid fuels) */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Full name of the risk */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category of the risk (e.g., ENV for Environmental, SOC for Social) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Full name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country for this data point */,
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Code of the variable for this data point */,
  "risk_code" TEXT /* Code of the risk for this data point */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex for this data point (e.g., Both, Male, Female) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group for this data point (e.g., All, 0-14, 15-29) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for this data point */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the data point */,
  "flag_codes" TEXT /* Flag codes for this data point */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags for this data point */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to which the data point belongs */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data point (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_code FOREIGN KEY ("variable_code") REFERENCES variables ("variable_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_risk_code FOREIGN KEY ("risk_code") REFERENCES risks ("risk_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
